name: Tyron Woodley

qualityWinLedger.context: UFC welterweight champion and elite title opponent.
Elite welterweight contender, injury finish context noted.
Elite grappler and ranked welterweight contender.

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Rory did not close the window because Woodley recovered and became champion. Usman endpoint.

lossContextEvents.context: Woodley recovered into UFC champion form.

shortCase: Woodley is a real welterweight title-reign case: 4 UFC title-fight wins, strong title names, and good prime durability.
bestArgument: Woodley has more real UFC title-fight value than most fighters in this rank zone.
counterArgument: The counterargument is that his reign had too many low-output stretches and Usman/Burns exposed the ending sharply.
whyRankedHere: Woodley ranks here because his UFC-only title resume is stronger than casual memory usually gives it credit for: he won the welterweight belt and added multiple title-level results before the Usman/Burns ending.
whyNotHigher: He does not rank higher because the resume depth falls off after the title names, the round-control profile was inconsistent, and Usman plus Burns clearly end the prime window.
finalTakeaway: Woodley is not an inner-circle GOAT, but he belongs above most short-reign champion cases because the UFC title resume is too strong to bury.
